descriptionHtml:
Bavaria Cruiser 42 For Sale 2021 | 3 Guest Cabins | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a Bavaria Cruiser 42 For Sale 2021, this yacht presents a practical and modern platform for comfortable sailing with friends or family. Built in 2021 and carrying the Greek flag, she is in good condition and maintained to professional standards. The Bavaria Cruiser 42 is popular for its well-thought-out interiors, reliable sailing characteristics, and quality equipment.

Specifications:

  • Boat Type: Sail
  • Year Built: 2021
  • Flag: Greek
  • Cabins: 3 Double + Convertible saloon
  • Onboard Capacity: 8
  • Berths: 8
  • Heads: 2
  • LOA: 12.40 m
  • Beam: 4.3 m
  • Draft: 2.10 m
  • Fuel Tank: 210 litres
  • Water Tank: 460 litres
  • Engine: Yanmar 57 hp, S-Drive, 3 blades folding propeller
  • Engine Hours: 1,600 (October 2025), Last service May 2025
  • Furling mainsail: Yes
  • Furling genoa: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Steering Wheel(s): 2
  • Autopilot: B&G
  • GPS: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Sound System: Radio, CD/mp3 player, cockpit speakers, control station in cockpit
  • Outboard: Yes
  • Dinghy: Yes
  • Gangway: Yes
  • Cockpit Table & Cushions: Yes
  • Swimming Platform & Ladder: Yes
  • Electric fans: In saloon and cabins
  • LED Lights: Yes
  • Safety Equipment: EPIRB, liferaft for 8 pax, full safety equipment
  • Bilge Pump: Electric with level control indicator
  • Oars for tender: Yes
  • Gas bottles, tools, spare parts: Included

In conclusion, the Bavaria Cruiser 42 For Sale 2021 is in good condition and available for immediate use, offering reliability, modern features, and comfortable accommodation for cruising in the Mediterranean or beyond. Contact us!
